---
title: "Economic Geography"
subtitle: "Spatial patterns of economic activities, production, and resource distribution."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include economic-geography/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Economic Geography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include economic-geography/01-economic-activities-and-sectors.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/02-factors-of-location.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/03-agricultural-systems.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/04-von-thunen-model.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/05-industrial-location-theories.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/06-manufacturing-industries.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/07-transport-and-trade.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/08-resources-concept-classification.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/09-energy-resources.md >}}

---

## Part B: NEP-2020 Specific Topics

These topics are part of the NEP-2020 undergraduate programme only.

{{< include economic-geography/10-sez-technology-parks.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/11-resource-development-conservation.md >}}

---

## Part C: UGC NET Specific Topics

These topics are part of the UGC NET syllabus only.

{{< include economic-geography/12-agriculture-measurement-methods.md >}}

{{< include economic-geography/13-contemporary-industry-trends.md >}}

---


---

## Quick Reference

{{< include economic-geography/19-quick-reference.md >}}

---
